phrases.english: Learn with passion, grow with heart.
phrases.russian: Учись с увлечением, расти с душой.

phrases.english: Breathe in calm, breathe out stress.
Let go, and you will float.
A new day, brings new chances.
Don't give up, see it through.
I miss your smile, a lot.
My world, is brighter with you.
Every word counts, little by little.

phrases.russian: Практика ведёт к успеху, не к идеалу.

phrases.english: Small steps, lead to big journeys.
Learn one word, know one thing.
Slowly, but surely, you'll get there.
I love your voice, so much.
Learn Russian, for fun, and growth.
phrases.russian: Учи русский, для смеха, и роста.

phrases.english: Speak Russian, make friends, explore culture.
phrases.russian: Говори по-русски, заводи друзей, исследуй культуру.

phrases.english: Learn a new skill, learn Russian.
So much to be thankful for.
You're the quiet hum of my contentment.
In your eyes, I find my north star.
phrases.russian: В твоих глазах я нахожу свою путеводную звезду.

phrases.english: You're the gentle rhythm of my heart.
One step at a time, always forward.
Stars guide dreams, then they shine.
A new word learned, power glows.
Hear it, grab it, own it.
For this calm moment, thank you.
For wisdom found, I am grateful.
My soul found rest, in you.
phrases.russian: Моя душа нашла покой, в тебе.
